name: CblTalnIdsClmLnCchgExtr
Description:
CALLED BY:


PROCESSING:  This job extracts data from the CCHG_SNGL_CAT_GRP file from cobalttalon and writes to a DataSet for further processing and filters out error records. Error file will be sent back to Cobalt Talon in Seq job.
